mnemonics: Hadoop: Happy All Day, Organizes Data
keyPoints: Data Warehouses: Centralized repository for storing data, simplified query, and reporting.
Hadoop: Distributed file system, Fault-tolerant and scalable, makes data processing efficient.
Data Warehouses: Typically use structured data, Star and Snowflake schema.
Hadoop: Used for big data, Unstructured and Semi-structured data processing.
